text:
uname -a:
reeBSD FreeBSD_CURRENT 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #1 main-n256553-0ed72537857b: Tue Jul  5 16:32:58 CEST 2022     root@FreeBSD_CURRENT:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/LIZBETH amd64


plasmashell --version:
plasmashell 5.24.5


tested on my desktop (i5, 16 GB, B75 chipset) and on two laptops. When you click on widgets and try to search alphabetically my whole system crashed, without any error recordings, sddm seems to do not anymore it should, having lightdm now and won't search for any widget on the left corner anymore. 

Someone else having this troube?
